description_long: This guard rail consists of a long, horizontal, rectangular panel supported by vertical posts at each end and possibly at intervals along its length. The main body appears to be made of a solid, dark-colored metal, likely steel, with a smooth, glossy finish. The top edge is slightly rounded, and the posts are cylindrical, extending slightly above and below the main rail. There are small protruding brackets or mounting points along the sides, suggesting attachment to a surface or additional modularity. A small blue marking or label is visible near the top center, possibly for identification or reflective purposes. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or tapering.
description: A sleek, dark metal guard rail with a rectangular panel and cylindrical posts, featuring a glossy finish and a small blue marking at the top center.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular panel, cylindrical posts, and a blue marking at the top center.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the rail and the cylindrical post, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back of the panel and the posts, with no visible markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and cylindrical post.
